titleStmt.title: SII 23.105: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 105. (A.R. No. 105 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kīri-Kṛishṇaṉ temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This inscription begins with the expression ‘Kōnērinmaikoṇḍan’-the unequalledan honorofic title of the reigning king, and is dated in the 6th year and 147th day of his reign. This records a royal order issued to the assembly of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to the effect, that an addition was to be made to the tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands already endowed to the temple of Nālāyira-Viṇṇagar built (?) by one Karumāṇikkāḻvāṉ alias Vēṇāvuḍaiyāṉ, so that a daily service called Avanivēndarāmaṉśandi after the king could be conducted in the temple, in addition to special worship to the god on all the days of his natal star Uttiraṭṭādi during the 12 months of the year. Veṇāvuḍaiyān was to be shown certain honours on these occasions.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanacakravatti koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ rājaḷarājaca
turvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyāṟkku taṅkaḷ paṟṟil teṉpiṭākai kalla ṭai
kkuṟucciyil veṇāvuṭaiyāṉ poṉrmmamāṉa nālāyiraviṇṇakarkku Ivaṉ
mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiiliyāka tāṅkaḷ paṟṟil tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭamāka koṇṭu Iṭṭapaṭikkuyātāṅkaḷ ka
ṭamai koṇṭu potukiṟa paṟṟukku yāṇṭu 6vatu kāttikai māsammutal muṉpupole nām tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamā
kak kuṭuttu Itukku namperāl Avaṉiventarāmaṉ sandhi Eṉṟum nam piṟanta nāḷ Utta
raṭṭāti tittamāka Iṉṉāḷmutal tirunāḷuṅkaṭṭuvatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Iv
volai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu taṅkaḷ paṟṟil Ivaṟkku tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭa māṉa paṟ
ṟum Ivar koyilukku kaṭavārkaḷ vacam viṭṭu Inta sandhiyilum Inta tirunāḷilu
m svāsantiriyamuḷḷatu karumāṇikkāḻvāṉāṉa veṇāvuṭaiyāṉukku kuṭuttu potum(p)paṭiyum Ikkoyi
lukku kaṭavārkaḷukku colla Ippaṭikku cantirātityavat celvatākak kalliluñ ce
mpilum veṭṭuvittuk kuṭukkaveṉṟu koṭumaḷūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻutti nālum Aṇṭakkuṭiyu
ṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṉālum yāṇṭu 6vatu nāḷ nūṟṟunāṟpattu Eḻiṉāl prasādañceytaruḷit
tu śubhamastu .. Iveḻuttu veṭṭineṉ kāliṅkarāya Ācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
